news.title:
Indian pharma stocks plunged as Trump administration considers 100% tariffs on certain medicines to reshore production.
Nifty Pharma fell 3.8%, with Biocon, Glenmark, Aurobindo, Sun Pharma, and Ipca Labs dropping over 4-5% amid tariff concerns.
news.summary:
Indian pharma stocks plunged as Trump administration considers 100% tariffs on certain medicines to reshore production.
Nifty Pharma fell 3.8%, with Biocon, Glenmark, Aurobindo, Sun Pharma, and Ipca Labs dropping over 4-5% amid tariff concerns.

news.title:
Motilal Oswal's Sneha Poddar recommends 5 stocks, including ICICI Bank and Max Financial, with up to 48% upside potential.
Stock picks include Tata Power, Aurobindo Pharma, and IPCA Labs, backed by strong growth, profitability, and operational improvements.
news.summary:
Motilal Oswal's Sneha Poddar recommends 5 stocks, including ICICI Bank and Max Financial, with up to 48% upside potential.
Stock picks include Tata Power, Aurobindo Pharma, and IPCA Labs, backed by strong growth, profitability, and operational improvements.

news.title:
Ipca Laboratories Ltd sees a shift to a confident bullish stance, driven by technical momentum.
Key indicators like moving averages, Bollinger Bands, and MACD support the bullish outlook.
news.summary:
Ipca Laboratories Ltd sees a shift to a confident bullish stance, driven by technical momentum.
Key indicators like moving averages, Bollinger Bands, and MACD support the bullish outlook.

news.title: IPCA Labs saw an NSE block trade of Rs. 60.65 cr for 381,656 shares at Rs. 1,589 each.
news.summary: IPCA Labs saw an NSE block trade of Rs. 60.65 cr for 381,656 shares at Rs. 1,589 each.

news.title:
IPCA Labs forecasts 10-11% overall growth, with branded, generic, and domestic segments rising 10-12%.
EBITDA margin may improve by 1.5% annually, indicating a 300 bps increase over two years.
news.summary:
IPCA Labs forecasts 10-11% overall growth, with branded, generic, and domestic segments rising 10-12%.
EBITDA margin may improve by 1.5% annually, indicating a 300 bps increase over two years.

news.title:
Ipca Laboratories aims for 18-20% EBITDA margins for Unichem in 2 years.
The company projects 10-12% long-term growth.
news.summary:
Ipca Laboratories aims for 18-20% EBITDA margins for Unichem in 2 years.
The company projects 10-12% long-term growth.

news.title:
IPCA Labs posts Q3 consolidated net profit of 3.3B INR, up from 2.5B YoY.
The performance reflects strong growth trajectory for IPCA Laboratories.
news.summary:
IPCA Labs posts Q3 consolidated net profit of 3.3B INR, up from 2.5B YoY.
The performance reflects strong growth trajectory for IPCA Laboratories.

news.title:
Ipca Laboratories begins commercial production at new API facility in Hingani, Wardha.
Facility built with Rs. 182 crores investment to expand pharmaceutical manufacturing.
news.summary:
Ipca Laboratories begins commercial production at new API facility in Hingani, Wardha.
Facility built with Rs. 182 crores investment to expand pharmaceutical manufacturing.

news.title:
IPCA Labs' Tarapur API facility classified as Voluntary Action Indicated post US FDA inspection.
Inspection occurred between Dec 1-5, 2025, with an Establishment Inspection Report issued.
news.summary:
IPCA Labs' Tarapur API facility classified as Voluntary Action Indicated post US FDA inspection.
Inspection occurred between Dec 1-5, 2025, with an Establishment Inspection Report issued.

news.title:
Ipca Laboratories Ltd will hold a conference call on Feb 16, 2026, at 15:30 IST to discuss Q3FY26 earnings.
The call, hosted by Dam Capital, will feature MD A.K. Jain and Corporate Counsel Harish Kamath.
news.summary:
Ipca Laboratories Ltd will hold a conference call on Feb 16, 2026, at 15:30 IST to discuss Q3FY26 earnings.
The call, hosted by Dam Capital, will feature MD A.K. Jain and Corporate Counsel Harish Kamath.

news.title:
IPCA Labs to sell its stake in Bayshore Pharma USA to Centaur Pharma USA for $400,000.
The sale aims to cut compliance costs as Bayshore is currently non-operational.
news.summary:
IPCA Labs to sell its stake in Bayshore Pharma USA to Centaur Pharma USA for $400,000.
The sale aims to cut compliance costs as Bayshore is currently non-operational.

news.title:
Ipca Laboratories executed an NSE block trade of ~130,260 shares at Rs. 1524/share.
The total trade value amounted to Rs. 19.85 crores.
news.summary:
Ipca Laboratories executed an NSE block trade of ~130,260 shares at Rs. 1524/share.
The total trade value amounted to Rs. 19.85 crores.

news.title:
Bombay HC restrains Anrose Pharma from using ZEROVOL-P, citing similarity to Ipca's ZERODOL.
Anrose Pharma ordered to pay ₹15 lakh within 8 weeks or face 8% annual interest.
news.summary:
Bombay HC restrains Anrose Pharma from using ZEROVOL-P, citing similarity to Ipca's ZERODOL.
Anrose Pharma ordered to pay ₹15 lakh within 8 weeks or face 8% annual interest.

news.title:
Ipca Laboratories' Tarapur API plant received US FDA Form 483 with 3 observations during Dec 1-5, 2025 inspection.
Q2 FY25 results: Net profit rose 23.1% YoY to ₹282.6 crore; revenue grew 8.6% YoY to ₹2,556.5 crore.
news.summary:
Ipca Laboratories' Tarapur API plant received US FDA Form 483 with 3 observations during Dec 1-5, 2025 inspection.
Q2 FY25 results: Net profit rose 23.1% YoY to ₹282.6 crore; revenue grew 8.6% YoY to ₹2,556.5 crore.

news.title:
Emkay Global initiates Buy on IPCA Labs, targeting Rs 1,700, citing domestic strength, export growth.
IPCA's net profit rose 23% YoY in Q2 FY26 to Rs 283 crore; revenue grew to Rs 2,556 crore.
news.summary:
Emkay Global initiates Buy on IPCA Labs, targeting Rs 1,700, citing domestic strength, export growth.
IPCA's net profit rose 23% YoY in Q2 FY26 to Rs 283 crore; revenue grew to Rs 2,556 crore.

news.title:
Ipca Labs' market evaluation revised due to financial and technical outlook changes.
Steady operations and valuation metrics indicate a cautious, balanced market view.
news.summary:
Ipca Labs' market evaluation revised due to financial and technical outlook changes.
Steady operations and valuation metrics indicate a cautious, balanced market view.

news.title:
Ipca Laboratories addressed a surveillance query on volume change, confirming no material events impacting price or volume.
The company assured compliance with regular disclosure norms and clarified absence of undisclosed events.
news.summary:
Ipca Laboratories addressed a surveillance query on volume change, confirming no material events impacting price or volume.
The company assured compliance with regular disclosure norms and clarified absence of undisclosed events.

news.title:
Oswal Pumps shares surged 6%, reaching an intraday high of ₹674.75 on Nov 14, 2025.
The rise followed strong Q2 results, increasing demand for the solar pump manufacturer.
news.summary:
Oswal Pumps shares surged 6%, reaching an intraday high of ₹674.75 on Nov 14, 2025.
The rise followed strong Q2 results, increasing demand for the solar pump manufacturer.

news.title:
Ipca Labs raised its consolidated EBITDA margin guidance by 1%, now expecting over 20%.
The updated guidance was shared during a recent concall update.
news.summary:
Ipca Labs raised its consolidated EBITDA margin guidance by 1%, now expecting over 20%.
